race.comment: COMPENSATION (6) graduated from Maiden company two-back, with a slick on-pace victory in fast time over 1000m at Randwick. Jumps 3.5kg in weight here and will prove hard to run down again from the inside draw. CREPE MYRTLE (4) classy mare who can stalk the fast tempo today from the low gate. Goes well here and looks the value play in the race. PETTICOAT (5) underrated mare resuming. Saves her best for this trip and returns with the slick 800m trial win. Can sit on the speed and give a ton of cheek. STRATAFY (8) holding her form in weaker grade and deserves a throw at the stumps here on the home track with the 53kg. Will roll forward and goes into the exotics. POKERJACK (3) strips fitter second-up and capable of better with the claim.
